Simple, transparent pricing

Start with Starter, scale with Pro, and move to Enterprise when your operation needs custom support and controls.

Save up to 18%

Starter

For new logistics teams launching quickly

£29/mo

Billed monthly

300 shipments / month

3 staff seats

Start Free Trial
  • Shipment creation and tracking
  • Branded customer notifications
  • Basic invoicing
  • Driver mobile proof-of-delivery
  • Branded public tracking page
  • VAT-ready invoicing
  • Email support

Pro

For scaling operations that need automation

Recommended

£79/mo

Billed monthly

2,000 shipments / month

15 staff seats

Start Free Trial
  • Everything in Starter
  • API access
  • Webhooks
  • Custom domain
  • Automation rules and webhook triggers
  • Multi-depot route views
  • Priority email + chat support
  • Up to 15 staff users

Enterprise

For high-volume teams with strict requirements

Custom

Billed monthly

Unlimited shipments

Unlimited staff seats

Contact Sales
  • SSO / SAML
  • SLA-backed uptime
  • Dedicated support
  • Advanced compliance controls
  • Custom SLA and uptime guarantee
  • Dedicated onboarding engineer
  • Audit logs and compliance exports
  • Unlimited users — not per seat

Frequently asked questions

Billing

You get full platform access with guided onboarding and no setup fee.

Yes. Annual billing provides discounted monthly equivalents for Starter and Pro.

You can upgrade instantly from the billing screen or contact support for volume-based options.

Contracts

No long-term contract is required. You can change plans as your needs evolve.

Enterprise is tailored for scale, support, and compliance requirements. Contact Sales for a custom proposal.

Need a plan tailored to your operation?

Talk with our team about enterprise controls, SSO, and dedicated support.

Launch a fully branded logistics platform — shipment ops, invoicing, driver app, and customer tracking. No code. No per-seat fees.
